instructions:
This is the reading and grammar section of the MET.

There are three parts in this section, with special directions for each part.

Try to answer all the questions. If you are not sure about an answer, you may guess.

You may answer the questions in any order you wish. You may click Back to go back to the last question. The numbers on the side of the screen will show you which questions have been answered.

parts.instructions: In this part of the test, you will answer some grammar questions. Choose the word or phrase to complete each sentence from the choices given.

questions.question: If the committee _______ the proposal earlier, the project could have started last month.
The manager suggested that the interns _______ more time on research before presenting.
Rarely _______ such a convincing argument presented in class.
The new regulations require that all employees _______ safety training annually.
No sooner _______ the announcement made than the audience began to applaud.
The director insisted that the report _______ in greater detail before being published.
By the time the conference began, the participants _______ all the necessary documents.
options: had been prepared every required file
had to prepare every required file

questions.question: The new policy aims to ensure that employees _______ equal opportunities regardless of background.
The teacher reminded the students that plagiarism _______ serious consequences in academic work.
options: could have resulted in severe penalties
could be result in severe penalties

questions.question: The project was delayed because the team _______ the technical issues earlier.
options: had not been addressed them properly
had not to address them properly

questions.question: The students decided to organize a meeting _______ they could discuss the project together.
options: so that they could share ideas

questions.question: The teacher asked the class to read the article carefully _______ they would understand the topic better.
options: because they would gain more knowledge
because they to gain more knowledge

questions.question: The company offered training sessions _______ the employees could improve their computer skills.
options: so that they could learn faster

questions.question: The children were excited to go to the park _______ they could play with their friends.
options: because they wanted to have fun
because they want to have fun
because they wanting to have fun

questions.question: The manager explained the new rules clearly _______ everyone could follow them without confusion.
options: so that they could understand easily

questions.question: The students were late _______.
The teacher asked us _______.
The company will hire _______.
The children enjoyed _______.
The meeting was canceled _______.
